info.name: Padel Booking – External API
info.description: API for the other mobile app: 1 court location. When they book you see it; when you book they see it. Set env: baseUrl (Cloud Functions URL), apiKey (x-api-key).

request.description: Get one location (courts, open/close times). Replace YOUR_LOCATION_ID with the Firestore document ID of your court location.
Get available slots per court for a date. Replace locationId and date (YYYY-MM-DD). Returns courts with availableSlots arrays.
Create a booking. courts: map of courtId -> array of slot strings (e.g. from Get Slots). Response includes bookingId; use it for Cancel.
Cancel a booking. Use the bookingId returned from Create Booking.
